title: During an Earthquake
immediate_steps: Drop to your hands and knees
Cover your head and neck with your arms, and crawl under a sturdy desk or table if nearby
Hold On to your shelter until the shaking stops
If in bed, stay there and cover your head with a pillow
If outside, move away from buildings, streetlights, and utility wires
avoid: Do not run outside during the shaking
Do not stand in a doorway (they are not stronger than the rest of the building and do not protect from falling debris)
